judge_reason: Description A claims there are 'two' diagrams with a caption 'Drawing by Al Evers', while Description B describes a single schematic diagram with a completely different title and no mention of the quoted caption, representing a fundamental disagreement on the number of figures and specific quoted text.
original_image_tags: Two black-and-white diagrams illustrating the physics of light refraction in air layers, captioned "Drawing by Al Evers".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned magazine page with three columns of text and two black-and-white illustrative diagrams at the bottom showing light rays over a horizon, one labeled with “WARM AIR,” “REFRACTING AIR LAYER,” and “COLD SURFACE.”*
